application.name: <application name as the user thinks of it>
application.catalog_url: <optional, link back to the catalog entry>

repos.name: <short repo name>
repos.local_path: <absolute path if already cloned, else null>

_meta._role_values: primary = main app code; supporting = sub-services/frontends in the same app; tooling = build/infra/scripts repos; docs = documentation-only repos
_meta._idempotency: scan-repo writes per-repo entries to .copilot/context.json keyed by name; re-running this skill replaces application.json entirely
